title: Python: Node.dispatch_udp signature change may break callers expecting Option
description:
In rust/lichen-node/src/node.rs:180-195 and python equivalent, dispatch_udp() was changed from returning Option<Result<...>> to returning Result<..., UdpDispatchError>.

Before: None meant 'not UDP', Some(Err) meant 'UDP but dispatch failed'
After: NotUdp variant in the error type

While semantically cleaner, this is a breaking API change. Tests were updated but external callers matching on is_some()/is_none() will break.

Location: rust/lichen-node/src/node.rs:180-195
Risk: Breaking change for any code pattern-matching on Option.
Fix: Document the API change in release notes; consider deprecation period for major version.
